Notice Of Hearingon Petition For Late Claim Statute
Off Calendar Aug-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open Court, Counsel for Plaintiff Eileen Tsaturyan appeared. The clerk informed counsel there was no notice to contest received yesterdaty and as the prevailing party to submit a proposed order which is verbatim with the court's ruling.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs ESTATE OF DIEGO AGUSTIN MEDINA JR., DIEGO MEDINA SR., and ESMERALDA MEDINA's Hearing on Petition For Late Claim Statute.

Plaintiffs' petition for relief from claim-filing requirements is granted.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
